brief_context: Speak kindly to people and uphold justice to all
True righteousness includes giving wealth to those in need
Spend in the way of Allah and do good
Allah loves those who constantly repent and purify themselves
Allah does not burden a soul beyond what it can bear
You will not attain righteousness until you give from what you love
Those who spend in ease and hardship, restrain anger, and pardon people
Consult them in the matter, show gentleness to those around you
Be good to parents, relatives, orphans, neighbors, and companions
Stand firmly for justice even if against yourselves or your parents
Be persistently standing firm for Allah, as witnesses in justice
Do not approach indecencies, be just to all people
Whoever comes with a good deed will have ten times its like
The believers command what is right and forbid what is wrong
Verily in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest
If you are grateful, I will surely increase you in favor
Allah commands justice, doing good, giving to relatives, and forbids wrong
Be good to your parents; do not say to them even 'uff'
Give the relative his right, and the needy, and the traveler
Do not walk on earth with arrogance
Wealth and children are adornment; righteous deeds are better with your Lord
Indeed I am Allah — worship Me and establish prayer for My remembrance
Let them pardon and overlook — do you not love that Allah forgive you?
The servants of the Most Merciful walk humbly and respond to ignorance with peace
They do not witness falsehood and pass by vain talk with dignity
Seek the next life but do not forget your share of this world; do good as Allah has done good to you
Recite the Book and establish prayer — remembrance of Allah is the greatest
Be grateful to Me and to your parents
Establish prayer, enjoin what is right, forbid wrong, and be patient
Do not turn your cheek in contempt nor walk arrogantly through the earth
Remember Allah with much remembrance and glorify Him morning and evening
Those who recite the Book, establish prayer, and spend from what We have provided
Indeed the patient will be given their reward without account
Repel evil with what is better — then your enemy becomes like a close friend
Avoid much suspicion; do not spy on one another; do not backbite
The most noble of you is the most righteous — get to know one another
Indeed those who give in charity will be multiplied and rewarded greatly
Make room in gatherings; Allah raises those who are given knowledge
Let not your wealth or children divert you from the remembrance of Allah
Fear Allah as much as you are able; spend for the benefit of your souls
Those in whose wealth there is a known right for the poor and deprived
Remember the name of your Lord and devote yourself to Him completely
They give food despite their love of it to the needy, the orphan, and the captive
Freeing a slave, or feeding on a day of hunger an orphan or a poor person in distress
Who gives his wealth to purify himself — not for any favor to be repaid
Those who believe, do right, urge each other to truth and to patience
Have you seen one who denies the Recompense? He drives away the orphan
Pray to your Lord and sacrifice — be grateful for the blessing of abundance
